helpText.credentialRef: Enter a credential reference name such as OPENAI_API_KEY, never an API key value.
helpText.secretSafety: Raw keys, bearer tokens, and secret-looking values are rejected before backend validation.
helpText.betaOnly: This onboarding wizard is limited beta only and cannot enable production access.
helpText.quotaBudget: Non-NVIDIA providers require quota, budget, governance, and credentialRef gates.
helpText.revokeRotateDisable: Use revoke, rotate, or disable actions if a reference is stale or no longer authorized.
